convergence.context: 3 posts across 3 channels (leakmealpha, muur_posts, shoalresearch) — mentioning Fireblocks Earn, Galaxy Curator, long.xyz, Fireblocks

sample_posts.text:
FTX to Begin Fifth Creditor Distribution Worth Approximately $900M on July 31
> FTX will begin its fifth round of creditor distributions, totaling approximately $900 million, on July 31, 2026, for eligible holders of allowed claims who have completed all pre-distribution requirements.
Source:
https://x.com/FTX_Official/status/2078171419754598494

tweet.text: FTX announced it will begin its Fifth Distribution of ~$900 million on 7/31/26 to holders of allowed claims in the Plan’s Convenience and Non-Convenience Classes that have completed the pre-distribution requirements.

sample_posts.text:
PRODUCT UPDATE:
@longdotxyz
now supports launches paired with tokenized stock tokens from Robinhood Chain. 5 KOLs we track followed in the last 24h.
Caught early on
leak.me

Galaxy launches institutional DeFi vault services on Morpho –
Link
Galaxy Digital launched "Galaxy Curator," an institutional-grade treasury management service built on Morpho and available to 2,400+ institutional clients through Fireblocks Earn. It lets institutions earn on-chain yields on idle stablecoins without managing DeFi infrastructure directly.
Matters because:
It removes a key barrier to institutional DeFi adoption and could bring more stablecoin liquidity into yield protocols.
